/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/simple_mmd_viewer_glfw.dir/simple_mmd_viewer_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_mmd_viewer_glfw.dir/__/external/gl3w/src/gl3w.c.o -o simple_mmd_viewer_glfw  -lGL -lGLU ../src/libSaba.a -lglfw -lX11 -ldl -lXrandr -lXinerama -lXcursor -lXrandr -lXxf86vm -ldl -lXinerama -lXcursor -lXxf86vm -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -ldl
